<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd">
<plist version="1.0">
<dict>
  <key>Label</key>
  <string>com.maw.schedule.odin-oracle.minute</string>
  <key>ProgramArguments</key>
  <array>
      <string>/Users/tester/.maw/bin/maw-schedule-fire</string>
      <string>odin-oracle</string>
      <string>minute</string>
      <string>refresh</string>
      <string>/opt/Code/github.com/Soul-Brews-Studio/odin-oracle</string>
      <string>24</string>
      <string>claude-headless</string>
  </array>
  <key>StartInterval</key>
  <integer>300</integer>
  <key>StandardOutPath</key>
  <string>/Users/tester/.maw/state/logs/odin-oracle.minute.log</string>
  <key>StandardErrorPath</key>
  <string>/Users/tester/.maw/state/logs/odin-oracle.minute.log</string>
  <key>EnvironmentVariables</key>
  <dict>
    <key>PATH</key>
    <string>/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin</string>
    <key>HOME</key>
    <string>/Users/tester</string>
  </dict>
  <key>RunAtLoad</key>
  <false/>
</dict>
</plist>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd">
<plist version="1.0">
<dict>
  <key>Label</key>
  <string>com.maw.schedule.odin-oracle.digest</string>
  <key>ProgramArguments</key>
  <array>
      <string>/Users/tester/.maw/bin/maw-schedule-fire</string>
      <string>odin-oracle</string>
      <string>digest</string>
      <string>write digest</string>
      <string>/opt/Code/github.com/Soul-Brews-Studio/odin-oracle</string>
      <string>4</string>
      <string>shell</string>
  </array>
  <key>StartCalendarInterval</key>
  <array>
    <dict>
      <key>Hour</key>
      <integer>1</integer>
      <key>Minute</key>
      <integer>42</integer>
    </dict>
    <dict>
      <key>Hour</key>
      <integer>7</integer>
      <key>Minute</key>
      <integer>42</integer>
    </dict>
    <dict>
      <key>Hour</key>
      <integer>13</integer>
      <key>Minute</key>
      <integer>42</integer>
    </dict>
    <dict>
      <key>Hour</key>
      <integer>19</integer>
      <key>Minute</key>
      <integer>42</integer>
    </dict>
  </array>
  <key>StandardOutPath</key>
  <string>/Users/tester/.maw/state/logs/odin-oracle.digest.log</string>
  <key>StandardErrorPath</key>
  <string>/Users/tester/.maw/state/logs/odin-oracle.digest.log</string>
  <key>EnvironmentVariables</key>
  <dict>
    <key>PATH</key>
    <string>/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin</string>
    <key>HOME</key>
    <string>/Users/tester</string>
  </dict>
  <key>RunAtLoad</key>
  <false/>
</dict>
</plist>
